summary:
MIDDLE EAST CONFLICT AND HIDDEN WEAPONS: Brandon describes visions of escalating conflict in the Middle East, noting Israeli strikes on Iranian oil and gas refineries and subsequent fluctuations in global oil prices influenced by President Trump and Vladimir Putin. Brandon claims to have seen a secret underground facility in northeastern Iran, near Turkmenistan and Afghanistan, where an Iranian leader and a scientist were discussing an untested, massive nuclear rocket payload. He details observing underground containers filled with biological and chemical warfare agents, including mustard-colored and red barrels marked with a Y, intended for a surprise attack against Israel.

ADVANCED MILITARY TECHNOLOGY AND GLOBAL LIBERATION: Brandon recounts receiving visions of highly advanced military technology granted to the United States. He describes a blue, water-based sustainable energy source, cleaner and more powerful than nuclear or fossil fuels, being implemented by Elon Musk into military spacecraft and fighter jets. According to Brandon, this technology is being restrained from countries like China and will soon be released by President Trump to liberate oppressed nations. He foresees Marco Rubio assisting in the liberation of Cuba, Venezuela, and Mexico, leading to a flourishing tourist and agricultural boom in Cuba following a successful citizens' revolt against cartels and corrupt leaders.

DOMESTIC THREATS AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon warns of an impending invasion on American soil orchestrated by Iranian sleeper cells exploiting border security vulnerabilities. He claims these cells are using untrackable rotary phones to coordinate attacks on critical infrastructure, including the Hoover Dam, the Las Vegas Strip, and major cities like Boston, New York, Philadelphia, and Chicago using U-Haul trucks. Furthermore, Brandon observes spiritual attacks targeting President Trump, describing demonic entities like a blackbird and a constrictor snake attempting to break his mind and physical health. He also identifies a pornographic demonic stronghold tied to a Rockefeller Illuminati wall in the northeast, contributing to national moral decay and internal strife within agencies like the Department of Homeland Security, the FBI, and ICE.

PROPHETIC NATURAL DISASTERS AND FUTURE TIMELINES: Brandon highlights recent and upcoming natural disasters as prophetic signs, specifically pointing to a 6.0 earthquake off the coast of Naples, Italy, and warning of a massive underwater volcano eruption that will cause a devastating tsunami and shake the Vatican. He predicts severe seismic activity along the Ring of Fire, including a major eruption in Japan and a tsunami striking Portland, Oregon, alongside severe, long-track tornadoes targeting the southern United States. Looking ahead, Brandon claims Jared Kushner is acting as a strategic errand boy for the Antichrist, orchestrating events in the Middle East and Israel that will eventually lead to the Ezekiel 38 and 39 war, the rebuilding of the Third Temple, and the implementation of mind-controlling microchips and an Islamic Antichrist flag. Despite these warnings, Brandon foresees a massive global revival and a window of economic blessing before the end times fully manifest.
rawData: [March 10, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/gLE4m-wraw8]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again tonight. I wasn't going to do a video tonight; I was going to take the day off, but I felt in my spirit we could just talk over some things real quick and we'll pray. We saw a lot of progress in our prayers for the nations even from the last 48 hours when we did those back-to-back videos. I told you I believe with all my heart God has assembled the greatest prayer group of any generation for such a time as this with people like you. He said, "Braden, I'm bringing my best," and I truly believe it, that the veterans and the newbies, the ones that are learning how to pray, I'm telling you, I really believe we're changing things. And so, finding these weapons of mass destruction has been on my heart all day. I truly believe they're in the northeast, underneath this mountain. I keep seeing this mountain. And if you go back to what we were looking at yesterday, I'll give a little recap real quick. I saw the man with the black hat hiding. I don't know; it sounds like they found him today. I don't know if this is true. I'm getting a lot of fake news, so you don't know who is real and who is not, but some people say that he was injured and they took his leg. Benny Johnson on his show tonight was saying that they believe that he was injured and they might have taken his leg off because of the injuries that he's sustained. I don't know if that's fake news or not, but as I continue to pray, I believe that the Lord is going to deal with this man, too. Some people say he's worse than the last one. There's so much news. There's so much stuff coming in that I said, "What do you believe and what do you not believe?" You have to really just filter it and go with what you're praying over. President Trump declaring that he believes the war is over; the economy, like I told you—Israel hit, from what I understand, every oil and gas plant in Iran. And if that is true, if they've hit every single one of them, this is exactly what the Lord showed us in our prayer time back in June of last year. And he told us that Israel would strike all the oil wells and the oil refineries, and there would be war on the Strait of Hormuz. We see that happening. Oil went up to $120 a barrel today as crude was skyrocketing because of the news of Israel, and then Iran hit one of Israel's main oil plants and their gas plants where they make diesel and everything else. They hit their largest plant, from what I understood last night. So, they struck their oil wells; they blew up all of theirs. When that happened, oil shot up to $120 a barrel. Now, President Trump came on and said, "The war is over. It looks like we're about over." Then oil started going back down when he and Putin said they were coming to an agreement on lifting the sanctions off of the oil for trade with Russia, which I know President Trump probably is trying to help our economy and he doesn't want people mad at him because midterms are coming. If you have gas lines and $10-a-gallon gas, you're going to have a lot of upset Americans. As we're praying into these things and seeing it, I believe the visions that the Lord shows me are so prayer changes things—that we don't have the gas lines, that we don't have massive gas prices go above $10 a gallon, and the anti-Semitism and all the things that the Lord has shown me. I know because part of the vision has already come true. The war with Iran, the striking of all the oil wells—that part of the vision has happened, manifested completely. The gas lines and oil going to $200 a barrel—this is the part where it split. And so far it only went to $120. No gas lines. It's interesting to me, the things that I see and we're praying over. Between all channels, we had probably 150,000 people pray over that last night. I'm not quite to 200,000, but just a little under with all seven channels. I give all the glory to God. There's so many of you that come out and pray like that. I know the power of prayer. If you get one of us to pray, good; two agreeing touching anything... just think about almost 200,000 people praying for up to two or three hours. That's amazing. I believe that we're changing things. I pray we don't see gas go up to $10 a gallon. That would be terrible and it would affect our economy greatly. Half of it is in the news, half of it's not. The power of prayer there. Number two, the Lord showed us yesterday, I believe, one weapon. And as I was in the spirit again, I could hear that new leader talking to a scientist. "Does it work?" I could hear him in English. "Does it work?" The scientist, in a white outfit, said, "It has not been tested yet, but we believe we have successfully built the bomb." It was ready to put on a rocket; it looked as long as a school bus, like a massive city bus. That's how big this thing was—a fat, round-looking rocket. They were pointing at this rocket saying that could be the payload. They were discussing this one thing. They only had one, but it was not tested. They said, "So, we don't know if it will work, but we all believe that it will. We only have one." And I believe that was a nuclear something. If you go back to what the Lord said: Hiroshima. Go back to that. That was an atom bomb. It wasn't like what we have now, these great big ones, but it was still something very significant that hit Japan in World War II. The Lord told us this, but as I was hearing this scientist talking to the man with the black hat, black turban, they kept talking back and forth: "What do we have at our disposal? What bigger artillery do we have underground?" They were discussing things, getting ready for a surprise attack against Israel with biological weapons. I saw biological weapons. I saw containers that were underneath the ground. They were separated out by Agent Orange. And there were three different kind of things. The first one looked like a mustard-yellow substance because the Lord highlighted it with a color. It was in a black drum, but in the spirit I could see a color on it. The next one was red. They only had about six or seven barrels stacked up three high. The others were over here and I could see them being stored, but there was a lot of it—50 or 60 barrels or more. This one looked red, and I saw on it the letter Y. I'm still praying about it, but it was some kind of biological weapon, chemical warfare. It was right next to it. That was something in the spirit realm. When I was looking at it, there was something that looked like another kind of object, but I couldn't focus on it. The visions come very fast and whenever I'm looking, so many things are coming at me. I don't take the time, because I'm on a live stream, to pause it and try to look into it. That's the trouble with being live. If it were in my private time, I would spend all day on that because I pray over it, and what I've learned to do is freeze-frame it in the spirit and just pray specifically over those biological weapons for hours and be able to focus in and look around them. It is all by the Spirit of God, all to the glory of God. I didn't do that last night, though I wish I would have now. I saw the missiles. They were painted black. Some were big, some were small. I believe with all my heart this is under a mountain in the northeast area of Iran, closer to Afghanistan. Turkmenistan is northeast up here, and this is Afghanistan. If I can see the map? I'm talking about the north-northeast area. So it had to be Turkmenistan. I see Iran and the mountains. In this vision, I saw mountains and I kept seeing northeast. It was underneath these mountains—great facilities. It doesn't matter anymore; I'm moving on. We have to do this quickly. I need your help. What else? I see, lower shows. You saw the new weapon? Thank you. Then I saw America's new weaponry. The Lord said that nobody else in the world, other than Israel, has some things that we've seen. Remember that the Lord said, 'I have granted the United States supernatural wisdom to get this weaponry to liberate and set free the nations of the world that are suppressed and oppressed from religious freedom: Venezuela, Cuba, North Korea, Iran, Pakistan, and these other nations.' I saw in the vision something that was stronger than nuclear, but it was water-based. A splitting of water that was a sustainable energy that never loses its power. It is better than fossil fuels; it is better than nuclear. This was a new type of energy, but it was blue. As it was glowing, I saw Elon Musk putting it on things to fly around and on rocket ships and Air Force planes so that you don't have to refuel them. They would be able to sustain energy indefinitely, like an F-16. I don't know what they have now, but planes that were fighter jets had turbines in the back with blue energy that was continually bubbling. It was cleaner energy than fossil fuels ever thought about being, but it was being harnessed only by the military for their special interests. It wasn't commercial; it wasn't used in a Ford F-150. It was used in spacecraft. I thought that was interesting. I saw secret weapons that we are about to use that will make the earth shock in awe at the technological advancements we have achieved only by the hand of God. The Lord said, 'I have restrained it where China has not been able to touch this.' I have held this back so that China... you know, it's like you have a block. You're able to see certain things because you're using part of your brain you never knew you had. Some people have really high IQs and some folks don't. You wonder how it is so clear to some and not for others. Their minds are different, but the Lord said, 'I put it on certain people to be able to achieve this technological advancement for the liberation and setting free of these nations.' In the days ahead, I will use this, but Trump must remain humble with this. It's not a dictatorship; it is a liberation. That makes sense where you don't come across like the Romans who would just wipe out anybody. We could go and pick a fight because we have the best stuff in the world. The Lord showed me that some of the technological advancements would be so overpowering that even Emmanuel Macron would freak out at the stuff we've never shown before. We have held it back and are about to release it. It will be concerning Cuba. I've told you I saw Marco Rubio helping liberate the people of Cuba, Venezuela, and Mexico in the days ahead—putting people in authority, helping establish the economy. I saw new resorts for vacation and economic growth out of Cuba with golf courses and things like that. A beautiful tourist industry is coming to Cuba in the days ahead with great hotels and facilities. Major American chains will go in there, buy up the land, and build resorts. I saw it coming. I saw Cuban cigar facilities exploding and I saw them distributing their cigars and doing things with their tobacco products. I saw a new leader rise up who was not a tyrant. As I was praying into that last night, I saw gangs and bosses that would start to turn. I saw African American men that had blue uniforms on with berets and blue camouflage who were protecting the leader of Cuba. But then I saw a revolt in the nation because they wanted freedom for the first time in decades. They wanted prosperity and for their families to have a better life. It was coming. I saw a blessing increase coming to the Cuban people, same with Venezuela with our oil and all the other things. We prayed against the guerrilla warfare coming out of Brazil and Colombia to attack the oil wells. We've been praying to stop that because I saw drug lords blackmailing families, telling them if they don't fight against the American troops and stop this from happening, they will take their family out and torture them. It was bad. I saw young men who didn't want to fight but were coming against us because they knew the terrain to try to get the oil wells in Venezuela. Praying over the secret cells in our nation, I saw an underground communication that was not the internet. It was a way the Iranian leader would communicate to the cells of people in our nation by telephone, but it was a rotary phone. It wasn't like a cell phone; it was some kind of old communication that was not able to be tracked as easily because you're not looking for it. They're trying to outsmart the 'smart' with 'dumb' technology. The Lord said, 'Remember the carrier pigeons? Remember Morse code? Remember the Cherokee Indians talking in World War II?' He said they're trying to communicate in a way that is out of the ordinary. I saw a telephone to telephone, and as this line went across America, there were little cords that were stretched from them to rotary phones in each area, getting ready to give them the command to stir up these cells. In our nation, as I was praying last night, I saw our nuclear power plants. I saw Hoover Dam and other major dams for electricity and what we use. If that happened, it would be a very catastrophic, bad thing. Now, I don't know how much explosive it would take to take out a dam that size like Hoover Dam, but that would be something very significant and you surely would see that coming. The Lord kept showing me in the vision U-Haul trucks, like Timothy McVeigh using fertilizer. I saw these dams, the Las Vegas Strip, and these major cities, and I named every single one of them off last night. I said, from Boston, New York, Philadelphia, and Chicago, and I told you every single one that was popping up concerning hotels, concerning Trump Towers, and concerning key landmarks. As I saw each one of these cities had over a hundred men that were stationed there for some kind of event, but they were waiting on the phone call. Just like our military does not do anything outside of the commander-in-chief telling them to do it—take the shot or not—they don't go rogue; they don't just operate out of what they think. They're strategic orders because they are not terrorists. This is an invasion from another nation, and that's what the Lord showed me. He said, "You are not looking at terrorists; you're looking at an invasion because of the Biden administration. They let these people in without border security over those four years, and because of it, they have flooded your nation." And he said, "There's other nations that are in your nation, China, with secret groups also, but the main group that you should be focused on praying for right now is the Iranians. They have infiltrated your nation." I saw these men, and the Lord said, "Pray over your high schools, your college campuses. Plead the blood." I told you to anoint your children with oil and pray over the churches. And the Lord said, "Watch the end of Ramadan. It is coming next week. Praying over Ramadan, the end of it going into our holy day; our holy week is Easter in two weeks, the first part of April." Praying over our churches and our gatherings because the largest services we have—I believe it's April 5th—yeah, praying over Easter on April 5th, small and large churches. Praying over our services and, Lord, praying clear into the celebrations for the 250th anniversary. You know, ladies and gentlemen, I know some of the things I say are heavy, but I know that the power of prayer changes things. And I know that he has called us to the kingdom for such a time as this: to pray for Trump, to pray for his family, and to pray for his sons, Eric and Don Jr., specifically the most. Not saying that Tiffany, Ivanka, and Barron are not important; these are the ones that are highlighted to me to pray over: the two older sons. The Lord said specifically Don Jr. the most. I saw him the most in the visions and I continue to do so. And we will continue to pray for his family and his daughter, Kai, that no weapon formed against them will prosper. Praying over President Trump that he will finish his term, that the blood of Jesus Christ covers him, and that he will have a clarity of thought. That devil I saw in his office that looked like a blackbird kept reaching down and pecking at his head. And the Lord said, "That is a spirit messing with him." I saw all the spirit and it was cloaked; it was hidden, and a lot of people couldn't see; you could only see it by the spirit of God. I saw it, and it kept like a woodpecker picking at his mind trying to make him nest, like Joe Biden yielded himself to that demonic spirit. I saw that snake crawl up by his feet and wrap around his whole body and start talking in his ear. It was a black serpent that looked like a constrictor. It was wrapped around his head and it started talking in his ear, and he was listening to a demonic spirit. I saw it as he was staring out the window. There's a lot of people that saw that video, and a lot of people didn't; that's clear back when we first started. And the Lord said, "You must pray." And we pray for Joe Biden just like we pray for President Trump. I have to say—no, I refrain that—I pray for Trump a lot more than I ever pray for Biden. I probably should have prayed for Biden more; I didn't. It was hard for me because I did not like that man. But I prayed for him—it wasn't always easy—and I still prayed for Kamala Harris and I prayed for our nation, but it wasn't always easy. But I pray for Trump all the time, and I will continue to do so. But I saw again: Rubio has slain his tens of thousands and Saul has slain his thousands. I saw a competitiveness coming between two men, for one would move with the hand of the Lord to liberate the people of South America and Cuba, and the other would be a tail rider. Like you get the draft of somebody else like Trump and you're riding behind him, the other would have his tens of thousands and one would have his thousands, and he would ride the tail thinking he already had it. But the Lord said, "I have my hand on this one." As I was praying into those things, I saw Homeland Security and the occult strategically putting strife into our law enforcement, our Homeland Security, and our FBI, trying to bring discord into our main people who are protecting us the most: the sheriff's department and the law. It was a cultic assignment. I saw specifically Homeland Security and concerning ICE a strife and a root of some kind of stirring up of strife in that department to divide a house divided. And the Lord specifically gave this scripture to us: "But Jesus knew their thoughts and said to them, 'Every kingdom divided against itself is brought to desolation, and every city or house divided against itself will not stand. If Satan cast out Satan, he is divided against himself. How then will his kingdom stand?'" The Lord said that because of the strife in this department, a house divided cannot stand. I saw a line dividing America last night that looked like a lightning bolt, and I saw blue versus red and I heard "civil war." As I was praying to this, I saw a plan of the enemy to bring great division in our Department of Homeland Security so that where there is strife, the Lord said there is confusion and every evil work. And he said the enemy was trying to specifically bring strife in the White House, in our Homeland Security, and in the Secret Service and FBI. He said he was trying to bring in strife so that there would be a dividing of the house that cannot stand. But where there's strife, there's confusion and every evil work. And he said, "If the enemy can get them off of their stance of leadership and uncovering this mass of people that has entered into our nation—MS-13, this deliberate sabotage—they will try to get a road in that they'll miss something and something tragic happens to your nation." I'm trying to make sure I make it as clear as possible. This is very serious, and that's why we were praying over our nation last night for peace in Homeland Security, the FBI, and the sheriff's department, that they will not have confusion and every evil work. They'll have peace that passes all understanding and they will find the evildoers in our nation and they will be brought to justice without any harm to any American civilians or churches. I truly believe we can change things through prayer. That's why you're here tonight, but I'm trying to give you a highlight real real quick. So we saw that and I saw the strife. I saw the Lord said there would try to be a civil war break out over American soil and I saw it would be red versus blue, which would be Democrat versus Republican. And the Lord said, "That's what the enemy would try to do is bring great division even on a greater level." And it was split. As I was looking into this, thank you, Holy Spirit. I saw a wall in the northeast that looked like a bronze wall that was really thick that had an all-seeing eye at the top of it that was purple across the top of it and engraved into this wall, it said Rockefeller. As I saw this thing, this wall with this eye looking out over everything looked like an all-seeing eye, like a pyramid, like the Illuminati stuff. It was on a wall. I saw a man with no shirt on, with a black mask on that was leather, with a dog collar on, with metal spikes all over this black thing on his head with a leather strap going down, and he looked like some kind of—I know I have a lot of kids watching me—very gross adult content. But that's what I saw. And the Lord said, "This is a spirit that is assigned to the nation; it's the pornographic, grotesque sexual stronghold that has been over the nation through pornography." And I saw that built right up here and is what was allowing, because of this spirit through the porn industry and over our nation, all this trash. The Lord said it has opened a door, and I saw this door that was almost like there was a demonic principality that looked like a huge black figure behind it and it was getting strength from the porn. So, I'm trying to tell you what I saw last night. But where there is strife, there's confusion in every evil work. And as I saw the strife trying to come in our departments of defense and all these things, the Lord said, "This is a strategic thing. Pray for peace. Pray for your president." His feet were trying to move with steel in his shoes and he was trying to move as much as he could. But there was so much demonic pressure even on his veins in his blood because the demonic spirits do not want him to accomplish what he's accomplishing. This is about the end of the end. That's why I said what I said last night. I was so bold about it trying to tell you all. I saw him moving, and the Lord said as I saw him moving that way, I saw the body of Christ with some big burly guys pick him up by his feet and by his backside and lift him up on their shoulders and they carried him across the finish line. So he was there and his feet still had that weight. But the body of Christ that was burly and was ready for war, the body of Christ that said, "Hey, I've got what it takes to fight the devil. Come on, President. You'll get on our backs. We'll carry you across the finish line. We'll get this done." And the Lord said, "What will you do to help this man? I am holding the church accountable if he makes it or doesn't. Carry him across the finish line in your prayers." I hope you're hearing me. He said, "Grab a hold of him and put him on your shoulders." And I saw President Trump with his nice clothes on and they were on with some guys that look like barbarians in the spirit realm. And they grabbed a hold of our president and they put him on their shoulders and they carried him across the finish line. And President Trump made what he's supposed to do. He did what he's supposed to do. And I saw the goal line—you know what I'm talking about? Not like a football. You see the end zone. We carried him to the end zone. And I'm telling you, that's what I saw. And I thought this is responsibility. As he had steel shoes, he had concrete blocks on his feet and he was moving, trying to get there: "Oh, I got to get to that end zone. I got to get to the end zone." And he was, but as he was doing it, the weight of the demonic on his blood was trying to destroy his organs and cause him to have a major heart attack and cause his veins to collapse because of the demonic pressure. There is great satanic attack against this man. As I saw him sitting at his Oval Office desk writing down things and there was a massive storm outside and the Lord said, "You must speak to the storm." That's what we're here for. There's 7,000 of you right now. And so I give you these highlights, but the Lord said there'll be great economic blessing come out of Cuba; there'll be a new leader over Mexico in the days ahead. I saw these things happening at night and the grid would go down. Things would happen against Cuba's grid and things will happen like that. And I'm telling you, it's going to happen within a 24-hour period. Cuba will be liberated. It'll be all over the news and a new beginning will come. And the Lord said, "But you still must pray for weapons of mass destruction against the Israeli people coming out of Damascus concerning an attack against the people out of Damascus." The Lord reminded me of a sermon that Perry Stone talked about that Damascus would be a ruinous heap like the Bible says. What causes that? I don't know. What actually happened? Some people say Israel used a nuclear weapon on them or something like that. I don't know. All I know is President Trump said today that he believed the war was over and in the stock market, he saved it. The oil fell. All these things took place today, I believe to help the economy, because after he announced that the stock went way up high, and then they said we're having meetings with Putin and all these things are happening with Putin. I know he is a chess player. Our president is a chess player. He's very brilliant and he's looking way ahead before it even happens. And so I know he listens to the prophetic. I know he does even more today after Donné. If anybody knows what President Trump posted on his Truth Social, he posted Kim Clement's word. So, President Trump is going through prophetic words and listening for guidance by the spirit, by the hand of the Lord. He knows. Donné said it blessed her. So of anybody in the community that has been through hell, that family has—losing Kim back in 2015, losing him to brain cancer or that tumor and going through all this and still sticking with it like they have going through the trenches and pulling these old prophecies out and bringing this out and following the call of God. Following the call of God on their lives and not giving up on something when they could have said they were so down and so outcast and saying, "Our dad's gone," and just giving up on it all. But they kept on keeping on and the Lord rewarded them today. And I thought of anybody that deserved it, I believe that young lady did and the mama, and I know Donné is. She's the spokesperson. She's the one that I see the most. But I love that family. There's some good people. They are some really good people and it blessed me. So, but this shows you that President Trump is seeking. He knows the prophetic. He knows what people are saying. But isn't this amazing that he would post this on his Truth Social today? He watched Kim Clement, but that shows you he's hungry and he's looking for guidance. So, we have a window to pray for him. And I truly believe we are not done with Iran yet. We must finish the weapons under the ground that I have seen. They must not be used. These weapons, we must liberate them completely. Now, that's where we need to step in and pray that they would find them. They need guidance and they need to know if they haven't found them already. We need to find those. So, what else is that? Yeah, pretty much. Can you show them anything else you found today? I talk too much, I think. How long did I talk? 47. Goodness gracious, I do it every night. That was good. And you had cloaking. You saw cloaking or something like that. I saw a really cool tech that cloaks them so that you can't see them on the battlefield. I saw an invisible shield, but it was on their clothes somehow, like a suit that makes the soldier and the people invisible. I thought that was pretty neat. And it would manipulate time and space like how you see somebody in the natural. They're there but they're not there. How? I don't know. I mean, that's pretty neat, huh? So that's what I saw. Now some people said, "Well, Brandon, you just gave classified information." Well, please don't throw rocks at me. I'm just telling you, hey, we're about to see some stuff we never thought we'd see, and it's going to be a while. Shock and awe. As I was praying last night, I saw the flag again. Show them the flag. This is the antichrist flag that he will raise whenever he becomes the Mahdi. When the Mahdi comes and their Islamic false god comes, which we call the antichrist, he will create a flag that looks like this. When I went to tribulation in 2014, this is what the flag looks like. I made it out of memory of what I saw when I was there. Those are the five pillars of Islam above the world with the green, the white, and the black. The sickle swords and the palm leaves represent what I saw them using to people's heads. That was about prosperity and whatever. It's part of the Islamic stuff that they have there. There's symbolism in it. It was in a world thing. The green represented a group of people like the Hamas, al-Qaeda, and ISIS. I saw Iran summoning these people up, "Will you help us to distribute?" Because they didn't want these weapons of mass destruction. Last night I saw this and when I was praying, we don't want America and Israel to find this, but they were willing to give it to Hamas and to al-Qaeda and to these other terrorist organizations to distribute them out as much as they could in the still of the night, trying to give these weapons away before they were destroyed by our military. And this is what I told you when this all happens. The Antichrist honors these groups of people with a stripe on the flag bringing forth his appearance. Does that make sense what I'm trying to tell y'all? Each color represented something. And that's what I saw that they'll put on every building, and they take down the American flag one day and they put that on the buildings and nobody resists it because they have the chip that's like Neuralink, and they put it in your head and it makes you like a zombie. It changes you and the way you think. You don't resist anymore; you become compliant to anything and everything they tell you to do. The moment you try to rebel, it sends a signal to your brain to calm you down. It sends endorphins to your body that you can't even harm yourself physically. The moment you take the mark they put in your hand, it sends an endorphin to you. And everyone worships at this place right here. And they worship all places like this all around America. That's in Oklahoma. I know, honey, but I want them to see it. Are you talking about the real location? No, I'm talking about that right there. Well, yeah, because it messes up.
